texto: Righteousness and love, law and grace, life and death, as well as time and eternity all intersect at the cross; displaying a divine wisdom that staggers the imagination and leads the humble heart to bow in thankful adoration. To understand the cross of Christ is to understand the heart of God toward a fallen world He wants to save.
explicacao: Citação de Steven Cook sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Righteousness and love, law and grace, life and death, as well as time and eternity all intersect…” articula reflexao, christianity, cross em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e cross.
